title: Bibliotheca Gynaecologica et Obstetricia, oder, Verzeichniss aller auf dem Gebiete der Gynaekologie und Geburtshülfe in den letzten 20 jahren 1847-1866: Im deutschen Buchhandel erschienenen Bücher und Zeitschriften: Ein bibliographisches Handbüchlein für Aerzte und Buchhändler
summaries: "Bibliotheca Gynaecologica et Obstetricia, oder, Verzeichniss aller auf dem Gebiete der Gynaekologie und Geburtshülfe" by Adolph Büchting is a bibliographic handbook written in the late 19th century. This work serves as a comprehensive catalog of books and journals published within the past twenty years in Germany, specifically addressing gynecology and obstetrics. Aimed primarily at physicians and booksellers, it systematically organizes literature in these fields, offering a valuable resource for medical professionals seeking to stay informed about recent developments.  The opening of this text presents an introduction by the author, emphasizing the need for dedicated bibliographic resources within the medical community. Büchting explains his motivation for compiling this catalog, noting the lack of a comprehensive and current listing of relevant literature prior to 1847. He outlines that the catalog includes works published between 1847 and 1866 and reassures readers about the thoroughness and practical utility of his compilation, mentioning an index that will enhance its functionality. The tone is scholarly and accessible, indicating the intended use of the catalog as a reference tool for those engaged in gynecological and obstetric studies.
